_README: This file holds ONLY non-secret PRODUCTION overrides — values that are safe to commit to source.
All secrets (DB password, JWT secret, storage keys, SMTP password, WhatsApp token) come from
App Service → Configuration at runtime. They are injected by the pipeline's
'Apply Prod app settings + connection strings' step from the 'api-prod-secrets' variable group.
.NET reads config in this order (later wins):
appsettings.json  →  appsettings.Production.json  →  environment variables  →  command-line args
Environment variables use __ as the section separator, e.g. Jwt:Secret  ↔  Jwt__Secret.
